narrative:
Prairie-J (precinct in Franklin County) has 591 registered voters, with 72.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
